updates.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
updates.summary: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries

updates.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas"
updates.summary: The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on AI.

updates.title: Widening the conversation on frontier AI
updates.summary: Over the past several months, we’ve been organizing dialogues with groups whose work and traditions bear on the questions raised by AI.

updates.title: An update on our election safeguards
updates.summary: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

updates.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
updates.summary: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

updates.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
updates.summary: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.

updates.title: Claude is a space to think
updates.summary: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.

updates.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
updates.summary: Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital.

updates.title: Anthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers
updates.summary: We're opening a new office in Milan, our sixth in Europe.

updates.title: Claude 4 Model Family Released
updates.summary: Anthropic launched Claude Opus 4 and Claude Sonnet 4 — the most capable Claude models yet, with stronger reasoning, coding, and instruction-following. If you're learning Claude, these are the models you'll want to use for complex tasks and agents.
